prBody:
## Summary

Ports upstream gsd-pi commit `526ed30` to otto-cli (adapted-port; path renames `gsd/auto.ts`ŌåÆ`workflow/auto.ts`, `gsd-db.js`ŌåÆ`db.js`).

Fixes an auto-mode stuck-loop where the wired dispatch adapter re-dispatched execute-task / complete-slice units that had already reached a closed status externally (e.g. a task completed out-of-band while a verification retry was queued).

## Change

In `src/resources/extensions/workflow/auto.ts`:
- Extend the `./db.js` import to add `getSlice`, `getTask`, `refreshOpenDatabaseFromDisk`.
- Add `getAlreadyClosedDispatchReason(unitType, unitId)` inside `createWiredDispatchAdapter` ŌĆö refreshes the open DB from disk, parses the unit id, and returns a reason string when the corresponding execute-task / complete-slice row is in a closed status.
- Two guards in `decideNextUnit`: after clearing `pendingVerificationRetryDispatch`, and after the dispatch-skip/action block ŌĆö when the unit is already closed, clear `session.pendingOrchestrationDispatch` and return `{ kind: "skipped", reason }`.

## Tests

New regression test `src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/auto-skip-already-closed-dispatch-107.test.ts` ŌĆö fails before the fix, passes after (verified failing again when the guards are neutralized).

## Gates (all green)

- Regression: fail-before / pass-after
- Build: pass
- Targeted suite: pass
- Full suite (`npm test` ŌåÆ `npm run verify:pr`): pass
- Independent reviewer: approve

Closes #107
